what_changed.text: Enterprise AI adoption is accelerating with production-grade AI agent deployments expanding in regulated industries like financial services.

strategic_signal.description: Production-grade AI agent deployments are expanding in regulated industries such as financial services, demonstrating increased enterprise trust and integration of AI systems with human oversight.
strategic_signal.watch_next_week: Monitor additional enterprise production deployments and customer announcements in regulated sectors.

what_changed.text: Cloud providers are increasing investment in AI infrastructure by integrating next-generation GPUs and optimizing model training platforms.

strategic_signal.description: Cloud providers are upgrading AI infrastructure by integrating next-generation GPUs and optimizing model training platforms, enabling more efficient and scalable AI development.
strategic_signal.watch_next_week: Track further infrastructure enhancements and GPU integrations announced by cloud providers.

why_it_matters.text: Growing trust and integration of AI in regulated sectors signal broader enterprise acceptance, unlocking new market opportunities and competitive advantages.

strategic_signal.watch_next_week: Monitor additional enterprise production deployments and customer announcements in regulated sectors.
